working_on: First project health-check audit per ADR 0022 + ADR 0042. User-directed manual fire at the project-setup-to-project-build phase boundary per health-check.md cadence policy ('one-off audit at the boundary, independent of the regular cadence'); the strict cadence trigger logic in start-engine.md step 2 fires at S-0031 boot per the off-by-one. Run engine/tools/health_check.py --session S-0030, augment with manual MemPalace recall + off-by-one cadence trigger + script bug fix observation, triage findings, commit docs/health-checks/S-0030.md, update STATE.md to point S-0031 at Session β (harness mechanization) and S-0032 at Phase 4 gate exercise.
outcome_summary: First project health check landed at docs/health-checks/S-0030.md. Script-emitted 5 mechanical findings; AI-augmented 5 manual observations; total 10. In-session resolutions: (1) OQ-WATCH-FLAG-FILE closed in tensions.md per its own decision criterion (2 watch-tagged tensions ≪ 10-entry threshold; unified file remains simpler); (2) audit script bug discovered + fixed mid-audit (audit_gaps's ADR-Consequences-deliverable path resolution checked only repo-root-relative paths while validate.py's equivalent check upgraded to dual-resolution at S-0029 Step 7; symmetry restored; new test locks it in; pytest 46 passing). Findings queued for Session β: (1) two-layer-decision-recording discipline almost entirely posture (1 MemPalace decision drawer for 42 ADRs — exactly what β's planned PostToolUse-on-ADR-write hook surfaces mechanically); (2) cadence-trigger off-by-one against prose intent (`last_claimed mod 30 == 0` strictly fires the session AFTER the cadence-numbered session; switch to `next_id mod 30 == 0`). Other findings reviewed: 4 aged tensions hold pending later phases (OQ-DEC1-A through D for Phase 6, OQ-WALL-BEHAVIOR for Phase 8, OQ-PEDAGOGY-INFERENCE-LOCUS still tagged watch with explicit trigger conditions); ADR clustering observation served by new cross-references.md; stale worktrees noted (≈30 under .claude/worktrees/) but not actionable this session. Validator clean at session close: 14 checks, 0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns. The audit confirms the soft-warn lifecycle infrastructure landed at S-0029 closes a real loop — without ADR 0042's structured archive field, this audit would have surfaced as much from manual telemetry inspection as from script. STATE.md re-points S-0031 at Session β and S-0032 at Phase 4 gate exercise per the user-directed re-sequencing.
